testcase.name: goToAmazonWithSafari

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. Host info: host: 'Ritus-MacBook-Air.local', ip: '2401:4900:1c82:8610:81b3:e103:9584:29f9%en0'
